author: mark
text:
Doc polish: SKILL/CLI help, Beads section rewrite

- SKILL.md: clarify closed/archived removal happens on the state
  branch's HEAD, not main.
- bl resolve: replace bare help with a one-line description noting
  bl sync runs it automatically.
- bl show: mention the delivered: line in the help string.
- README "Beads": rewrite to acknowledge balls also keeps state off
  main (orphan ref) and reframe the contrast as one VCS vs two.
